Hive Hazards.result: Arbites Clean-Up Crew: Heavily armed enforcers executing any mutants they find in the street. High threat.
Rival Gang Ambush: Scavengers looking to pick the bones of the failed uprising. Low threat, but can cost resources.
Toxic Vent Overpressurance: A sudden blast of superheated promethium exhaust or acidic sump-gas. Forces an Agility or Toughness test.
Structural Collapse: A catwalk or decayed ceiling gives way. Climbing gear or a high Strength/Agility test required to survive without major injury.
The Purge Servitors: Industrial kill-servitors deployed by the spire-lords to cleanse the area with heavy flamers.
Desperate Refugees: Starving mutant underclass begging for food or salvation. An opportunity to recruit, or a drain on resources.
Bounty Hunter: A well-equipped Imperial bounty hunter tracking Chiron specifically, having noticed him with the Traitor Legionnaire.
Tech-Blight Mutation: The local machinery (cogitators, mag-doors) has become corrupted by the Warp, attacking anyone who comes near.
Warp-Tainted Flora/Fauna: Sump-krocs or aggressive fungal blooms driven mad by the thinning veil.
